query: SELECT id, planType, trialStartDate, trialDays, NOW() AS now_time, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, trialStartDate, NOW()) AS minutes_elapsed, FLOOR(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, trialStartDate, NOW()) / 1440) AS days_elapsed, GREATEST(0, trialDays - FLOOR(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, trialStartDate, NOW()) / 86400)) AS days_remaining, CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, trialStartDate, NOW()) >= (trialDays * 86400) THEN 'EXPIRADO' ELSE 'ATIVO' END AS trial_status, DATE_ADD(trialStartDate, INTERVAL trialDays DAY) AS expiration_date FROM establishments WHERE id = 30001;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT id, planType, trialStartDate, trialDays, NOW() AS now_time, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, trialStartDate, NOW()) AS minutes_elapsed, FLOOR(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, trialStartDate, NOW()) / 1440) AS days_elapsed, GREATEST(0, trialDays - FLOOR(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, trialStartDate, NOW()) / 86400)) AS days_remaining, CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, trialStartDate, NOW()) >= (trialDays * 86400) THEN 'EXPIRADO' ELSE 'ATIVO' END AS trial_status, DATE_ADD(trialStartDate, INTERVAL trialDays DAY) AS expiration_date FROM establishments WHERE id = 30001;
